effects.description: Short confirmation pulse on the back and both sleeves.
effects.trigger_description: game script starts and bHaptics bridge registers effects

effects.description: Compact right-side handgun recoil on torso and right sleeve.
effects.trigger_description: handgun or revolver shot

effects.description: Fast automatic-fire tick biased to the right arm.
effects.trigger_description: SMG or automatic weapon fire

effects.description: Heavy right shoulder blast with recoil aftershock.
effects.trigger_description: shotgun or magnum shot

effects.description: Long-gun recoil through right shoulder and support sleeve.
effects.trigger_description: rifle or launcher shot

effects.description: Right-arm melee swing sweep with light torso brush.
effects.trigger_description: melee swing starts

effects.description: Right-arm impact punch into the vest.
effects.trigger_description: melee hit connects

effects.description: Left chest and sleeve pulse for throwable handling.
effects.trigger_description: grenade, flash, or other throwable fire/use

effects.description: Right hip draw/stow locator pulse.
effects.trigger_description: weapon changes while the hip holster zone is active

effects.description: Right shoulder longarm draw/stow sweep.
effects.trigger_description: longarm changes while the shoulder holster zone is active

effects.description: Left chest slot draw/stow pulse.
effects.trigger_description: weapon changes while the chest holster zone is active

effects.description: Healing pulse spreading from left sleeve into the torso.
effects.trigger_description: HP recovery or manual syringe heal succeeds

effects.description: Broad torso impact for player damage.
effects.trigger_description: player damage calculation or HP loss

effects.description: Alternating torso and sleeve crackle for electric damage.
effects.trigger_description: player damage with electric attack attribute

effects.description: Long fading collapse pulse for player death.
effects.trigger_description: player death

effects.description: Short environmental shock on the torso.
effects.trigger_description: camera shake request

effects.description: Small chest and sleeve pickup confirmation.
effects.trigger_description: inventory add item

effects.description: Left sleeve and pouch tap for grabbing reload ammo.
effects.trigger_description: manual reload mag, shell, or bullet grab

effects.description: Firm support-hand insert click into the weapon.
effects.trigger_description: manual reload mag, shell, or bullet insert

effects.description: Low release pulse for magazine or shell drop.
effects.trigger_description: manual reload magazine or shell drop

effects.description: Support sleeve pull-back for slide, bolt, or pump action.
effects.trigger_description: manual rack or pump pulled back

effects.description: Support sleeve forward lock for slide, bolt, or pump action.
effects.trigger_description: manual rack or pump closes

effects.description: Tiny right sleeve trigger click for dry fire.
effects.trigger_description: dry trigger pull

effects.description: Short cylinder or barrel latch click.
effects.trigger_description: revolver cylinder or break action closes

effects.description: Chest slot and sleeve pulse when a throwable is equipped.
effects.trigger_description: throwable long-press equip

effects.description: Throwing-arm sweep and torso release for a thrown item.
effects.trigger_description: throwable release succeeds

effects.description: Subtle left forearm brace cue for block stance.
effects.trigger_description: manual block/parry pose becomes active

effects.description: Forearm and front torso impact while blocking.
effects.trigger_description: incoming hit while block pose is active

effects.description: Sharp successful parry snap across forearm and vest.
effects.trigger_description: native parry success event

effects.description: Right sleeve confirmation when the manual syringe is armed.
effects.trigger_description: optional external event: manual syringe spawns

effects.description: Small right sleeve alignment cue for syringe injection zone.
effects.trigger_description: optional external event: manual syringe enters valid injection zone

effects.description: Low right sleeve buzz for failed manual syringe use.
effects.trigger_description: optional external event: manual syringe use fails or no stock is available

effects.description: Low torso and sleeve pulse when bike mode starts.
effects.trigger_description: bike first-person mode becomes active

effects.description: Short low torso engine rumble tick while bike mode is active.
effects.trigger_description: periodic bike mode rumble
